name: Mashed Sweet Potatoes with Pecans
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Bake sweet potatoes until tender, about 45 to 60 minutes. Remove and discard the skin.
3. Reduce oven temperature to 375°F.
4. Mash the potatoes and beat in eggs, syrup, one tablespoon melted margarine, salt, and cinnamon. Add enough orange juice to moisten and make fluffy.
5. Spoon into a 1 1/2 quart baking dish and drizzle with honey and remaining one tablespoon margarine. Sprinkle with pecans.
6. Bake for 20 minutes. Serve warm.
